name: Monotone 765 spades, BTN SRP
description: Monotone spades straight-ladder board. Every spade in either range makes flush or flush draw; 89/98 makes straight; 55/66/77 make sets. Tests the solver's suit-sensitivity: rainbow 765 would play very differently. Hero = BTN, villain = BB.

input.hero_range: 22+, A2s, A3s, A4s, A5s, A6s, A7s, A8s, A9s, ATs, AJs, AQs, AKs, K9s, KTs, KJs, KQs, Q9s, QTs, QJs, J9s, JTs, T9s, 98s, 87s, 76s, 65s, A9o, ATo, AJo, AQo, AKo, KTo, KJo, KQo, QTo, QJo, JTo
input.villain_range: 55-TT, A2s, A3s, A4s, A5s, A6s, A7s, A8s, A9s, ATs, AJs, AQs, AKs, K2s, K3s, K4s, K5s, K6s, K7s, K8s, K9s, KTs, KJs, KQs, Q7s, Q8s, Q9s, QTs, QJs, J8s, J9s, JTs, T7s, T8s, T9s, 97s, 98s, 86s, 87s, 75s, 76s, 64s, 65s, 53s, 54s, A9o, ATo, AJo, AQo, AKo, KTo, KJo, KQo, QTo, QJo, JTo

expected_notes: Populated by differential run. Monotone makes top-set fragile (any spade busts) — watch whether TexasSolver plays sets aggressively or slow-plays.
